report_name: CISA Launches 'CI Fortify' to Bolster Critical Infrastructure Resilience

identities.name: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency
identities.description: U.S. government agency that launched the 'CI Fortify' initiative to provide guidance for improving the resilience of U.S. critical infrastructure.

identities.name: U.S. Critical Infrastructure Entities
identities.description: The target audience for the 'CI Fortify' guidance, encompassing all 16 critical infrastructure sectors in the United States, urged to implement proactive isolation and recovery capabilities.
